nasb.text: Now Eli was very old; and he heard all that his sons were doing to all Israel, and how they lay with the women who served at the doorway of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: Now Eli was very old, and he kept hearing all that his sons were doing to all Israel, and how they lay with the women who were serving at the entrance to the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 以利已經非常老了，聽見自己的兒子對待以色列人的一切事，又聽見他們與在會幕門口侍應的婦女同寢。

ccb.text: 以利年事已高，他听说两个儿子对待以色列人的恶行，以及他们与在会幕门口供职的妇女行淫的事后，
